title: extract FSL repo w/ versioned spec + conformance (was jssm#650)
manager: Extract FSL into its own repository housing a versioned language specification and a conformance suite — the answer to 'where does the contract live?'. Once FSL is a language with multiple implementations and trust claims, it needs a home that is the spec, separate from any one implementation, with a conformance suite any implementation can be tested against. This is that housing decision made real.
cs: the contract's housing question; underpins the multi-host/fleet conformance story
